logs.message: WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Port 'out_breath_gpio' with mode 'ap_none' may require an associated data valid signal to correctly communicate with other blocks or a test bench; automatic C/RTL co-simulation may not be able to verify such a port.

WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Port 'in_breath_gpio' with mode 'ap_none' may require an associated data valid signal to correctly communicate with other blocks or a test bench; automatic C/RTL co-simulation may not be able to verify such a port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Design contains AXI ports. Reset is fixed to synchronous and active low.

WARNING: [HLS 200-960] Cannot flatten loop 'VITIS_LOOP_43_1' (image_passthrough.cpp:49:29) in function 'Loop_VITIS_LOOP_43_1_proc1' more than one sub loop. Resolution: For help on HLS 200-960 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.2;t=hls+guidance;d=200-960.html

WARNING: [HLS 200-471] Dataflow form checks found 5 issue(s) in file image_passthrough.cpp Resolution: For help on HLS 200-471 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.2;t=hls+guidance;d=200-471.html

WARNING: [HLS 214-114] Since the only kind of statements allowed in a canonical dataflow region are variable declarations and function calls, the compiler may not be able to correctly handle the region (image_passthrough.cpp:30:9) Resolution: For help on HLS 214-114 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.2;t=hls+guidance;d=214-114.html

WARNING: [HLS 214-113] Either use an argument of the function or declare the variable inside the dataflow loop body (image_passthrough.cpp:102:2) Resolution: For help on HLS 214-113 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.2;t=hls+guidance;d=214-113.html

WARNING: [HLS 214-113] Either use an argument of the function or declare the variable inside the dataflow loop body (image_passthrough.cpp:101:13) Resolution: For help on HLS 214-113 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.2;t=hls+guidance;d=214-113.html

WARNING: [HLS 214-111] Static scalars and arrays declared inside a dataflow region will be treated like local variables (image_passthrough.cpp:33:21) Resolution: For help on HLS 214-111 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.2;t=hls+guidance;d=214-111.html

WARNING: [HLS 214-111] Static scalars and arrays declared inside a dataflow region will be treated like local variables (image_passthrough.cpp:32:21) Resolution: For help on HLS 214-111 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.2;t=hls+guidance;d=214-111.html
